nodes.name: DumpLoader
nodes.rationale: Loads tensor dumps from disk by metadata queries. Core utility for debug workflow.

nodes.name: ValueWithMeta
nodes.rationale: Wraps loaded tensor values with parsed filename metadata for downstream matching.

nodes.name: parse_log_file
nodes.rationale: Parses structured log files into comparable records.

nodes.name: ModelTruncator
nodes.rationale: Truncates model weights for reduced-memory debugging.

nodes.name: TensorDumpForwardHook
nodes.rationale: PyTorch forward hook that dumps intermediate tensors to disk.

nodes.name: compare_text_outputs
nodes.rationale: Compares generated text outputs for divergence detection.

nodes.name: BundleComparator
nodes.rationale: Compares matched tensor bundles between baseline and target runs.

nodes.name: BundleMatcher
nodes.rationale: Matches tensor bundles across two runs using metadata heuristics.

nodes.name: Display
nodes.rationale: Renders comparison results in human-readable format.

nodes.name: DPUtils
nodes.rationale: Dynamic programming utilities for sequence alignment in comparator.

nodes.name: entrypoint
nodes.rationale: Main CLI entry point for tensor comparison pipeline.

nodes.name: LogSink
nodes.rationale: Structured log consumer for comparator diagnostics.

nodes.name: MetaOverrider
nodes.rationale: Overrides tensor metadata for forced matching.

nodes.name: OutputFormatter
nodes.rationale: Formats comparator output into reports.

nodes.name: OutputTypes
nodes.rationale: Type definitions for comparator output structures.

nodes.name: PerTokenVisualizer
nodes.rationale: Visualizes per-token differences in tensor comparison.

nodes.name: Preset
nodes.rationale: Predefined comparator configurations for common scenarios.

nodes.name: ReportSink
nodes.rationale: Structured report consumer for comparator results.

nodes.name: ComparatorUtils
nodes.rationale: General utilities for the comparator framework.

nodes.name: AxisAligner
nodes.rationale: Aligns tensor axes using einops-style operations.

nodes.name: AlignerEntrypointExecutor
nodes.rationale: Executes the full aligner plan: unshard, reorder, token align, axis align.

nodes.name: AlignerEntrypointPlanner
nodes.rationale: Plans the multi-stage alignment pipeline.

nodes.name: TracedTypes
nodes.rationale: Type traces for aligner intermediate values.

nodes.name: AlignerTypes
nodes.rationale: Core type definitions for aligner plans and steps.

nodes.name: ReordererExecutor
nodes.rationale: Executes tensor reordering operations.

nodes.name: ReordererPlanner
nodes.rationale: Plans tensor reordering based on parallel layout differences.

nodes.name: ReordererTypes
nodes.rationale: Type definitions for reorderer plans.

nodes.name: TokenAlignerEntrypoint
nodes.rationale: Entry point for token alignment strategies.

nodes.name: ConcatStepsExecutor
nodes.rationale: Executes concatenation-based token alignment.

nodes.name: ThdSeqLensLoader
nodes.rationale: Loads sequence lengths for concatenation alignment.

nodes.name: SmartAuxLoader
nodes.rationale: Loads auxiliary data for smart token alignment.

nodes.name: SmartAuxPlugins
nodes.rationale: Plugin system for smart token alignment auxiliary data.

nodes.name: SmartExecutor
nodes.rationale: Executes smart token alignment with prefix matching.

nodes.name: SmartPlanner
nodes.rationale: Plans smart token alignment by matching sequences.

nodes.name: SeqInfoBuilder
nodes.rationale: Builds sequence information structures for alignment.

nodes.name: SmartTypes
nodes.rationale: Type definitions for smart token alignment.

nodes.name: UnsharderExecutor
nodes.rationale: Executes tensor unsharding operations.

nodes.name: ParallelInfo
nodes.rationale: Encodes parallel layout information for unsharding.

nodes.name: UnsharderPlanner
nodes.rationale: Plans unsharding by grouping parallel coordinates.

nodes.name: UnsharderTypes
nodes.rationale: Type definitions for unsharder plans.

nodes.name: CommentParser
nodes.rationale: Parses comments in dimension specifications.

nodes.name: DimsParser
nodes.rationale: Parses dimension specification strings like b s[cp:zigzag] h[tp] d.

nodes.name: DimParser
nodes.rationale: Parses individual dimension tokens.

nodes.name: ModifierParser
nodes.rationale: Parses dimension modifiers like [cp:zigzag].

nodes.name: TensorNaming
nodes.rationale: Manages tensor naming conventions in dims spec.

nodes.name: DimsSpecTypes
nodes.rationale: Type definitions for dimension specification AST.

nodes.name: TensorComparator
nodes.rationale: Computes element-wise differences between aligned tensors.

nodes.name: TensorComparatorFormatter
nodes.rationale: Formats tensor comparison results.

nodes.name: TensorComparatorTypes
nodes.rationale: Type definitions for tensor comparison results.

nodes.name: VisualizerFigure
nodes.rationale: Builds matplotlib figures for comparison visualization.

nodes.name: VisualizerPanels
nodes.rationale: Arranges visualization subplots into panels.

nodes.name: VisualizerPreprocessing
nodes.rationale: Preprocesses tensors for visualization.

nodes.name: ScheduleSimulatorEntrypoint
nodes.rationale: CLI entry point for schedule simulation.

nodes.name: GPUState
nodes.rationale: Tracks per-GPU state in schedule simulation.

nodes.name: Metrics
nodes.rationale: Collects scheduling metrics during simulation.

nodes.name: Request
nodes.rationale: Represents a request in schedule simulation.

nodes.name: Simulator
nodes.rationale: Discrete-event simulator for request scheduling across GPUs.

nodes.name: DataLoader
nodes.rationale: Loads real scheduling traces for simulation.

nodes.name: DataSynthesis
nodes.rationale: Synthesizes synthetic scheduling workloads.

nodes.name: BaseRouter
nodes.rationale: Abstract base for request routing strategies.

nodes.name: RandomRouter
nodes.rationale: Routes requests randomly across GPUs.

nodes.name: RoundRobinRouter
nodes.rationale: Routes requests in round-robin fashion.

nodes.name: StickyRouter
nodes.rationale: Routes requests to previously assigned GPUs.

nodes.name: BaseScheduler
nodes.rationale: Abstract base for GPU scheduling policies.

nodes.name: FIFOScheduler
nodes.rationale: First-in-first-out scheduling policy.

nodes.name: CodePatcher
nodes.rationale: Patches live Python function code at runtime.

nodes.name: SourceEditor
nodes.rationale: Edits Python source text for patching.

nodes.name: SourcePatcherTypes
nodes.rationale: Type definitions for source patching operations.

nodes.name: DecodePreallocQueue
nodes.rationale: Manages preallocated decode requests in disaggregated serving.

nodes.name: DecodeTransferQueue
nodes.rationale: Manages KV cache transfers to decode instances.

nodes.name: SchedulerDisaggregationDecodeMixin
nodes.rationale: Mixin adding decode-side disaggregation to scheduler.

nodes.name: DecodeKVCacheOffloadManager
nodes.rationale: Manages offloading of KV cache for decode instances.

nodes.name: EncodeGrpcServer
nodes.rationale: gRPC server for multimodal encoder in disaggregated setup.

nodes.name: MMEncoder
nodes.rationale: Multimodal encoder server: loads vision/audio models, encodes inputs, supports global cache.

nodes.name: MMReceiverBase
nodes.rationale: Base class for receiving encoded multimodal embeddings.

nodes.name: MMReceiverHTTP
nodes.rationale: HTTP transport for receiving multimodal embeddings.

nodes.name: MMReceiverGrpc
nodes.rationale: gRPC transport for receiving multimodal embeddings.

nodes.name: BlockStored
nodes.rationale: Event fired when a KV block is stored.

nodes.name: BlockRemoved
nodes.rationale: Event fired when a KV block is removed.

nodes.name: AllBlocksCleared
nodes.rationale: Event fired when all KV blocks are cleared.

nodes.name: PrefillBootstrapQueue
nodes.rationale: Manages prefill request bootstrapping in disaggregated serving.

nodes.name: SchedulerDisaggregationPrefillMixin
nodes.rationale: Mixin adding prefill-side disaggregation to scheduler.

nodes.name: get_kv_class
nodes.rationale: Factory function returning KV buffer class for a given transfer backend.

nodes.name: TransferBackend
nodes.rationale: Enum of supported KV transfer backends: Mooncake, Mori, Nixl, Ascend, Fake.

nodes.name: MetadataBuffers
nodes.rationale: Manages metadata buffers for KV transfer coordination.

nodes.name: ReqToMetadataIdxAllocator
nodes.rationale: Allocates metadata indices for requests.

nodes.name: AscendConn
nodes.rationale: Ascend NPU connection for KV transfer.

nodes.name: AscendTransferEngine
nodes.rationale: Transfer engine implementation for Ascend NPUs.

nodes.name: BaseConn
nodes.rationale: Abstract base class for transfer backend connections.

nodes.name: DecodeScheduleBatchMixin
nodes.rationale: Mixin for decode-side schedule batch handling in disaggregation.

nodes.name: TensorComparisonPipeline
nodes.rationale: End-to-end pipeline: load dumps -> match bundles -> align tokens -> compare tensors -> visualize.

nodes.name: AlignerPlan
nodes.rationale: Multi-stage plan comprising unshard, reorder, token align, and axis align steps.

nodes.name: SmartTokenAlignment
nodes.rationale: Token alignment strategy using exact then prefix matching of sequences.

nodes.name: DisaggregatedServing
nodes.rationale: Architecture separating prefill and decode into distinct servers with KV cache transfer.

nodes.name: MultimodalEncoderServer
nodes.rationale: Standalone server for encoding vision/audio inputs, supporting HTTP/gRPC and embedding cache.

nodes.name: ScheduleSimulation
nodes.rationale: Discrete-event simulation framework for evaluating scheduling policies and routers.

nodes.name: SourcePatching
nodes.rationale: Runtime Python code modification via inspect, textual edit, and __code__ replacement.

nodes.name: KVEvents
nodes.rationale: ZMQ-based event system for KV cache lifecycle notifications.

nodes.name: TransferBackendAbstraction
nodes.rationale: Pluggable backend abstraction for KV transfer across Mooncake, Mori, Nixl, Ascend, Fake.

nodes.name: DebugUtilsEcosystem
nodes.rationale: Comprehensive debugging toolkit: tensor dumping, comparison, schedule simulation, and source patching.

edges.rationale: entrypoint calls BundleMatcher to match tensor bundles.
AlignerEntrypointExecutor calls SmartExecutor for token alignment.
SmartPlanner uses SeqInfoBuilder to construct sequence info.
SmartExecutor uses SmartAuxLoader for auxiliary data.
UnsharderExecutor uses ParallelInfo to determine concat/pick/reduce.
UnsharderPlanner uses ParallelInfo for grouping coordinates.
DimsParser uses DimParser for individual dimensions.
DimsParser uses ModifierParser for dimension modifiers.
DimsParser uses CommentParser for inline comments.
TensorComparator results are formatted by TensorComparatorFormatter.
Simulator uses BaseRouter to route requests.
Simulator uses BaseScheduler to schedule GPUs.
CodePatcher uses SourceEditor to modify source text.
CodePatcher uses SourcePatcherTypes for type safety.
MMEncoder produces embeddings consumed by MMReceiverBase.
get_kv_class selects implementation based on TransferBackend enum value.
MetadataBuffers uses ReqToMetadataIdxAllocator for index management.
BlockStored is a KV event type.
BlockRemoved is a KV event type.
AllBlocksCleared is a KV event type.
Visualization is optional end stage of pipeline.
DisaggregatedServing uses TransferBackend for KV movement.
DisaggregatedServing may include multimodal encoder server.
TransferBackendAbstraction is represented by TransferBackend enum.
DataLoader feeds real traces into ScheduleSimulation.
DataSynthesis feeds synthetic workloads into ScheduleSimulation.
TensorDumpForwardHook produces dumps consumed by DumpLoader.
Parsed logs may feed into comparison pipeline for text divergence.
Text comparison may be part of overall debug comparison.
DecodeScheduleBatchMixin likely extends decode disaggregation mixin.
DPUtils may be used by SmartPlanner for sequence matching.
MetaOverrider modifies metadata in comparison pipeline.
OutputTypes defines types used by OutputFormatter.

hyperedges.rationale: End-to-end tensor comparison pipeline: load -> match -> align -> compare -> visualize.
Disaggregated serving architecture: prefill, decode, transfer backend, multimodal encoder, receiver, and KV events.
Schedule simulation components: simulator, router, scheduler, GPU state, metrics, and requests.
